---
title: false
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{r}
#| include: false

library(dplyr)
library(readr)

f_valid <- file.path(
  "~/Symobio/Data/Processed/BF_NEE_Diagnostics",
  "bfnee_valid_countries.csv"
)

f_diag <- file.path(
  "~/Symobio/Data/Processed/BF_NEE_Diagnostics",
  "bfnee_country_diagnostics_all_transitions.csv"
)

valid <- read_csv(
  f_valid,
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

diag <- read_csv(
  f_diag,
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

n_valid <- valid %>%
  filter(valid_for_analysis) %>%
  summarise(n = n_distinct(iso3)) %>%
  pull(n)

n_processed <- valid %>%
  summarise(n = n_distinct(iso3)) %>%
  pull(n)

n_transitions <- diag %>%
  summarise(n = n_distinct(transition)) %>%
  pull(n)

n_outputs <- nrow(diag)
